abilities.name: Duck and Weave
abilities.text: When this model is targeted with an attack, it may drain two (soulstone) to place within 3". If it is no longer a legal target, the attack fails.

abilities.name: "Hold These"
abilities.text: When this model discards an upgrade, another friendly model within 10" may attach it.

abilities.name: Raid Boss
abilities.text: When this model is deployed, it attaches three Improvised Enhancement upgrades.

triggers.name: Strip Defenses
triggers.text: This model may remove a token from the target.

triggers.name: According to Plan
triggers.text: After resolving, move the target up to 4".

triggers.name: See the Trick
triggers.text: Another ally with LoS to the target gains an Adaptable token.

triggers.name: Battlefield Salvage
triggers.text: This model attaches an Improvised Enhancement upgrade.

actions.name: Clever Plannin'
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target allies. Discard an Improvised Enhancement upgrade.
actions.effects: The target declares the Walk action controlled by this model. If it scales terrain during this action, draw a card.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Exhibition Shooting
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. The TN of this action is equal to the distance in inches between this model and target Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within 4" of the target, then remove the target.

triggers.name: Needled
triggers.text: Enemy models within (v)1" of the made marker must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or gain a Perforated token.
